description: A color photograph in the Oval Office. A man in a dark suit stands with his right hand raised and his left hand on a Bible held by a woman beside him, taking an oath. A woman in dark clothing administers the oath at right, and several people including young adults watch in the background. A man with white-gray hair in a dark suit stands in the blurred foreground at left, and a presidential seal is visible on a folder at lower right.
